creators.tagline: From bedroom gamer to internet legend — shaped, and reshaped, by the algorithm

eras.label: Early Let's Plays
eras.description: Starts with Minecraft and horror gameplay. Low production, webcam reactions, personality-driven content begins to take shape.

eras.label: Happy Wheels Breakout
eras.description: Blows up with Happy Wheels and other chaotic gameplay. Loud, exaggerated reactions + fast uploads drive rapid subscriber growth.

eras.label: YouTube King Era
eras.description: Hits 50M subscribers. Content becomes more polished, diverse — vlogs, meme reviews, occasional social commentary.

eras.label: Meme Review Era
eras.description: Pivots to meme culture and commentary. YouTube algorithm punishes gaming content; he adapts with shorter, shareable formats.

eras.label: Post-Algorithm Auteur
eras.description: Slows uploads, marries Marzia, experiments with book club and niche content. Deliberately stepping back from the algorithm.

creators.tagline: The algorithm didn't change MrBeast — he reverse-engineered it from day one

eras.label: Early Grinding
eras.description: Low production gaming and commentary videos. Obsessively studies retention and virality before finding his formula.

eras.label: Viral Stunt Era
eras.description: Counting to 100,000. Reading every word in the dictionary. Pure retention-bait before the big budget arrived.

eras.label: Big Money Era
eras.description: Gives away cars, cash, houses. Production value explodes. Reinvests every dollar into bigger stunts.

eras.label: Beast Games Era
eras.description: Squid Game recreations, island survival, $1M prizes. Content becomes indistinguishable from reality TV.

creators.tagline: Horror king who grew up on camera — the algorithm watched him change too

eras.label: Horror & FNAF Era
eras.description: Explodes with FNAF and horror gameplay. Emotional reactions and earnest persona build cult following.

eras.label: Variety & Growth
eras.description: Expands beyond horror into sketches, collabs, and charity streams. Maintains authenticity while scaling.

eras.label: Modern Auteur
eras.description: Produces elaborate cinematic YouTube productions. Unus Annus, Heist, Iron Lung. Resists pure algorithm optimization.

creators.tagline: The OGs who got swallowed by the machine they helped build

eras.label: Golden Age
eras.description: Pokemon theme, food battle, random skits. YouTube's first viral sensations before monetization existed.

eras.label: Expansion & Channels
eras.description: Smosh Games, Smosh Pit, Every Blank Ever. Franchise expands as the algorithm rewards consistent formats.

eras.label: Corporate & Reboot
eras.description: Sold to Defy Media, Anthony leaves, near-death. Re-purchased by Ian. Struggling to reconcile nostalgia with algorithm demands.
